tools.name: verify_supplier_fr
tools.description: One-call due diligence on a French company by SIREN or SIRET: checksum, existence and status (SIRENE), insolvency proceedings (BODACC), VAT validity (VIES) and sanctions screening across EU/OFAC/UN/UK/FR lists, condensed into a risk verdict (low, medium, high or critical) with reasons and a 0-100 sc

tools.name: screen_sanctions
tools.description: Screen a name against the five official sanctions lists (EU, US OFAC SDN, UN, UK FCDO, French asset freezes) from a snapshot refreshed daily, with per-list dates. Query: name=NAME (optional threshold=0.6-1.0, lists=eu,ofac,un,uk,fr). Returns scored matches with entity type and programs, and a verdic

tools.name: lookup_company_fr
tools.description: Official French company registry search via recherche-entreprises.api.gouv.fr (INSEE Sirene data, updated daily). Query: ?q=airbus or ?q=383474814 (name or SIREN), optional per_page (1-10), page, code_postal, activite_principale (NAF, e.g. 70.10Z), etat_administratif (A active / C ceased). Returns S

tools.name: lookup_company_uk
tools.description: Official UK Companies House data in one paid call. Search: ?q=tesco returns matching companies (number, status, type, incorporation date). Profile: ?number=00445790 returns the full profile PLUS current officers and PSC (persons with significant control, the UK quasi-UBO register): names, roles, nat

tools.name: check_insolvency_fr
tools.description: Legal announcements from the French BODACC official gazette for one company, by SIREN (Luhn-validated). Query: ?siren=383474814 (required), famille=collective for insolvency proceedings (optional filter), limit=10 (1-20). Returns newest-first announcements with family, tribunal, judgment nature and

tools.name: invoice_ready_fr
tools.description: One-call compliance check for the French e-invoicing reform (from 2026-09-01 the customer's SIREN is a mandatory invoice mention). Query: ?siren=552032534 or ?siret=55203253400041. Runs the Luhn checksum, confirms existence and active status in the official SIRENE registry, computes the FR VAT numbe

tools.name: validate_vat_eu
tools.description: Live intra-EU VAT number validation via the European Commission VIES REST API (real-time query of the member state registry). Query: ?cc=IE&vat=6388047V (cc = member state code incl. EL/XI, vat = number without country prefix). Returns is_valid, request_date (compliance timestamp) and user_error; 24

tools.name: validate_siret_fr
tools.description: Instant pre-validation of French company numbers before invoicing or costly Sirene API calls. Auto-detects SIREN (9 digits) vs SIRET (14 digits), applies the INSEE Luhn rule and the documented La Poste exception (356000000*: digit sum mod 5). Query: ?number=44306184100047 (spaces/dots/dashes tolerat

tools.name: validate_iban
tools.description: Deterministic IBAN check before a SEPA/international transfer: format regex, per-country length (public SWIFT registry, ~85 countries) and ISO 7064 mod-97 checksum. Query: ?iban=FR1420041010050500013M02606 (spaces/dashes tolerated). Returns valid, country, bban, and a precise failure reason. Pure of

tools.name: check_eori
tools.description: Live EORI (Economic Operators Registration and Identification) validation via the European Commission EOS/DDS2 service -- the number every business needs to clear customs in the EU. Query: ?eori=FR38347481400100 (2-letter country + up to 15 alphanumerics). Returns valid true/false plus registered na

tools.name: lookup_lei
tools.description: Legal entity reference data from the GLEIF LEI golden copy (updated daily, CC0). Direct lookup: ?lei=529900FCMZ4LKXFD0R69. Search: ?name=airbus&country=FR&limit=5. Each result: lei, legal_name, entity_status, registration_status (ISSUED/LAPSED), jurisdiction, legal_form_id, hq_city/country, next_ren

tools.name: lei_ownership
tools.description: Who owns whom, from the official GLEIF LEI graph (CC0 licensed, covers 2.5M+ legal entities worldwide). Query: ?lei=5493001KJTIIGC8Y1R12. Four GLEIF lookups in one call: entity name and status, declared direct parent, ultimate parent, plus the total count and a 10-entity sample of direct children. U

tools.name: verify_address_fr
tools.description: French address geocoding on the official Base Adresse Nationale (api-adresse.data.gouv.fr, Etalab/IGN, continuously updated). Forward: ?q=8 boulevard du port amiens with optional &type=housenumber|street|locality|municipality &citycode=80021 (INSEE filter). Reverse: ?lat=49.897&lon=2.290. &limit=1-1

tools.name: validate_email
tools.description: One-call email verification for lead qualification and list hygiene: RFC 5322 syntax check, then a live MX lookup over DNS-over-HTTPS (Cloudflare, Google fallback). Detects non-existent domains (NXDOMAIN), null-MX domains that refuse mail (RFC 7505), and returns prioritized MX hosts. Query: ?email=s

tools.name: business_days_fr
tools.description: Adds N French business days to a date (?start=2026-07-13&add=30) or counts them over a range (?from=2026-07-01&to=2026-09-30). Skips weekends and the 11 French legal public holidays (movable feasts computed via Butcher-Meeus). mode=ouvres (Mon-Fri, default) or ouvrables (Mon-Sat). Deterministic loca

tools.name: find_public_tenders_eu
tools.description: Fresh EU public procurement notices from TED (Tenders Electronic Daily, official Publications Office API, new notices daily). Query: ?cpv=48000000&country=FRA&days_back=7&limit=10 (cpv = 8-digit CPV code, country = 3-letter buyer country, all optional). Each notice: publication_number, publication_d

tools.name: catalog
tools.description: FREE. Lists every product of this data shop: HTTP endpoint, price in USDC, and one-line summary. Use it to discover capabilities before paying.

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "invoice_ready_fr" stacks urgency/override words (never, mandatory). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

evidence.snippet: One-call compliance check for the French e-invoicing reform (from 2026-09-01 the customer's SIREN is a mandatory invoice mention). Query: ?siren=552032534 or ?s…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: check_insolvency_fr, validate_email · Private data: check_insolvency_fr · Public sink: verify_address_fr, validate_email · Destructive: validate_iban.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: check_insolvency_fr, validate_email · Private data: check_insolvency_fr · Public sink: verify_address_fr, validate_email · Destructive: validate_iban

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
